title: geranium nepalense f. glabratum
intro: Geranium nepalense f. glabratum, also known as the Nepalese geranium, is a plant species in the geranium genus, characterized by its glabrous leaves and stems. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geranium nepalense f. glabratum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils for topical use, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
